emails.subject: Re: Deal 474440.01
emails.body: Re: Deal 474440.01 This deal was a sleeve done for EES, and we've had problems with the trade dates on these before. EES reported this trade to us on 12/6/00, and it was Matt Motley's understanding that the trade was executed the previous day. He doesn't care either way, but he suggested you talk to someone at EES maybe Jubran Whalan or Neil Bresnan about what their intent was with the date. In the meantime, I can change the date to 12/4 if you'd like. What would be best? E-mail or call and let me know. Thanks a lot! Kate 503-464-7486 Stephanie Piwetz 12/19/2000 08:15 AM

emails.subject: Deal 474440.01
emails.body: Deal 474440.01 Kate- Please verify trade date for trade 474440.01, we received our executed Enron Confirmation Letter back from Powerex Corp and they struck thru our trade date of 12/4/00 and placed 12/5/00. Matt Motley was trader, Jan 2001, $375.00, Cob N/S. Please check and I will make note and send to Powerex. Thank you.

emails.subject: Re: Deal 474440.01
emails.body: Since it is a sleeve with EES, I receive all there daily spreadsheets, I will check there and see what date it is under. We'll hold up and I will let you know. Thanks Kate Symes 12/19/2000 10:30 AM
